lines.chinese: “没有打错的电话”是什么意思？
lines.raw: What does 'No wrong numbers' mean? | “没有打错的电话”是什么意思？

lines.english: Mr.James Scott has a garage in Silbury
lines.chinese: 詹姆斯·斯科特先生在西尔伯里有一家汽车修理厂
lines.raw: Mr.James Scott has a garage in Silbury | 詹姆斯·斯科特先生在西尔伯里有一家汽车修理厂

lines.english: and now he has just bought another garage in Pinhurst.
lines.chinese: 现在他刚刚在平赫斯特又买了一家。
lines.raw: and now he has just bought another garage in Pinhurst. | 现在他刚刚在平赫斯特又买了一家。

lines.english: Pinhurst is only five miles from Silbury,
lines.chinese: 平赫斯特离西尔伯里只有五英里，
lines.raw: Pinhurst is only five miles from Silbury, | 平赫斯特离西尔伯里只有五英里，

lines.english: but Mr. Scott cannot get a telephone for his new garage,
lines.chinese: 但斯科特先生无法为他的新修理厂安装电话，
lines.raw: but Mr. Scott cannot get a telephone for his new garage, | 但斯科特先生无法为他的新修理厂安装电话，

lines.english: so he has just bought twelve pigeons.
lines.chinese: 所以他刚买了十二只鸽子。
lines.raw: so he has just bought twelve pigeons. | 所以他刚买了十二只鸽子。

lines.english: Yesterday, a pigeon carried the first message from Pinhurst to Silbury.
lines.chinese: 昨天，一只鸽子把第一封信从平赫斯特带到了西尔伯里。
lines.raw: Yesterday, a pigeon carried the first message from Pinhurst to Silbury. | 昨天，一只鸽子把第一封信从平赫斯特带到了西尔伯里。

lines.english: The bird covered the distance in three minutes.
lines.chinese: 这只鸟在三分钟内飞完了这段距离。
lines.raw: The bird covered the distance in three minutes. | 这只鸟在三分钟内飞完了这段距离。
Up to now, | 到目前为止，

lines.english: Mr.Scott has sent a great many requests for spare parts
lines.chinese: 斯科特先生已经送出了大量的备件请求
lines.raw: Mr.Scott has sent a great many requests for spare parts | 斯科特先生已经送出了大量的备件请求

lines.english: and other urgent messages from one garage to the other.
lines.chinese: 以及其他紧急信息，从一家修理厂到另一家。
lines.raw: and other urgent messages from one garage to the other. | 以及其他紧急信息，从一家修理厂到另一家。

lines.english: In this way, he has begun his own private 'telephone' service.
lines.chinese: 通过这种方式，他开创了自己私人的“电话”服务。
lines.raw: In this way, he has begun his own private 'telephone' service. | 通过这种方式，他开创了自己私人的“电话”服务。
